---
applyTo: "docs/**"
---

# Documentation Instructions

## Purpose
Documentation is a first-class artifact and defines the **specification the code must follow**.

Documentation should be:

- structured
- concise
- consistent across files
- easy for humans and AI agents to interpret

---

# Documentation Hierarchy

The repository uses structured documentation with **canonical documents**.

## Canonical Docs

These documents define the authoritative specification of the project:

- docs/project_brief.md
- docs/architecture.md
- docs/roadmap.md
- docs/tech_stack.md

Additional documentation may exist, but these files represent the **source of truth**.

---

`docs/architecture.md` has **special editing rules**.
